display.purpose: Hero title and final CTA only. Maximum two instances on the entire page.

headline.purpose: Section headings. One accent-colored word with text-shadow glow per heading.

title.purpose: Card headings, step titles, world names. All-caps, tracking-wide.

body.purpose: Card descriptions, section subtitles. Font-light, variable opacity by context.

label.purpose: Stat labels, token symbols, technical identifiers. All-caps, monospace.

shadows.name: ambient-aura
shadows.purpose: Resting state on glass panels. Atmospheric depth without drawing attention.

shadows.name: hover-bloom
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. Accent color bleeds outward, deep shadow anchors.

shadows.name: neon-halo
shadows.purpose: Button resting state. Dual-layer glow with tight bright core and diffuse outer ring.

shadows.name: neon-halo-intense
shadows.purpose: Button hover state. Intensified glow on lift.

shadows.name: button-bevel
shadows.purpose: Physical bevel on btn-neon bottom edge. Creates arcade button tactility.

shadows.name: inner-highlight
shadows.purpose: Glass panel inner highlight. Ghost bevel at the top edge.

shadows.name: stat-glow
shadows.purpose: Stat card numbers. Each value glows in its own accent color via text-shadow.

motion.name: lenis-scroll
motion.purpose: Global smooth scroll via Lenis. All scroll interactions pass through this.

motion.name: scrub-timeline
motion.purpose: GSAP ScrollTrigger scrub value for hero pinned timeline. Synced with Lenis.

motion.name: entrance-ease
motion.purpose: Standard entrance easing. Fast start, gentle settle. Used on all scroll-triggered reveals.

motion.name: exit-ease
motion.purpose: Standard exit easing. Gentle start, fast exit. Used when scroll layers leave.

motion.name: hover-ease-in
motion.purpose: Hover enter easing. 0.3-0.4s duration. Scale and lift.

motion.name: hover-ease-out
motion.purpose: Hover leave easing. 0.5-0.6s duration. Slight overshoot bounce for arcade tactility.

motion.name: char-entrance
motion.purpose: Character-level title entrance. Each character pops in with overshoot.

motion.name: icon-bounce
motion.purpose: Feature icon entrance. Elastic bounce-in from scale 0.

motion.name: btn-overshoot
motion.purpose: Button hover transition. CSS-only overshoot curve.

motion.name: stagger-fast
motion.purpose: Scroll layer line stagger. Rapid successive reveals.

motion.name: stagger-medium
motion.purpose: Card and step stagger. Visible cascade.

motion.name: reveal-smooth
motion.purpose: CSS-only reveal transition. Used on .reveal-up utility.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Hot Magenta neon CTA with shine sweep animation. The main conversion action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 2.2rem; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff4fd8, #ff6be5); color: #07010f; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255,79,216,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(255,79,216,0.2), inset 0 -3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(255,79,216,0.7), 0 0 50px rgba(255,79,216,0.3), inset 0 -3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4fd8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Electric Cyan ghost button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 2.2rem; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; background: transparent; color: #35f2ff; border: 2px solid rgba(53,242,255,0.5); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(53,242,255,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.03); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(53,242,255,0.3); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #35f2ff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Wallet Button
components.description: Wallet Lilac variant of outline button. Signals safe secondary action.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-wallet"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="6" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M2 10h20"/><circle cx="17" cy="15" r="1.5" fill="currentColor"/></svg> CONNECT WALLET</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-wallet { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 2.2rem; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; background: transparent; color: #a78bfa; border: 2px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.4); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-wallet:hover { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.08); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(167,139,250,0.25); color: #c4b5fd; } .ds-btn-wallet:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.description: Frosted glass container for feature cards and blockchain cards. Neon edge seam at top.
components.html:
⚡

MPP PAYMENTS

Machine Payment Protocol for instant, gasless micro-transactions.
components.css: .ds-panel-glass { position: relative; background: rgba(7,1,15,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,79,216,0.12); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(111,66,255,0.08), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 1.75rem; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease; } .ds-panel-glass::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,79,216,0.4), transparent); } .ds-panel-glass:hover { border-color: rgba(111,66,255,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(111,66,255,0.15), 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-panel-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .ds-panel-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-panel-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); line-height: 1.625; }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Ghost-bordered status pill with emoji icon. Used in hero scroll layers and feature highlights.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.45rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: #e0d0ff; background: rgba(111,66,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(111,66,255,0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-badge:hover { background: rgba(111,66,255,0.12); border-color: rgba(111,66,255,0.35); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-badge-icon { font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact metric display with accent-colored number and monospace label.
components.html:
$2.4M
VOLUME TRADED
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: rgba(7,1,15,0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(111,66,255,0.12); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem; text-align: center; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-stat-card:hover { border-color: rgba(111,66,255,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(111,66,255,0.1); } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 900; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); margin-top: 0.375rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Category Badge
components.description: Scroll layer category indicator with pulse dot or icon. Identifies each hero scroll phase.
components.css: .ds-category-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; background: rgba(111,66,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(111,66,255,0.35); color: #a78bfa; } .ds-pulse-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #7dff72; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }

narrative.overview:
The visual system is built around the feeling of racing through illuminated lanes at night. Every surface is dark, every accent is a streak of light. The page scrolls like a game trailer: cinematic darkness punctuated by bursts of neon, guiding the eye forward through a story told in color and motion. The scroll itself is the gameplay metaphor; each section is a scene.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS landing pages, overly complex DeFi dashboards, and template-feeling crypto sites. No hero-metric templates. No identical card grids. No corporate blue gradients. No cookie-cutter "neon on black with hexagons" that every web3 project defaults to. The interface should feel immersive and playable, not corporate.

The personality is playful, friendly, fast. It's a racing game, not a financial instrument. Crypto complexity hides behind simple language. Every element earns its place by contributing to the narrative or driving the visitor toward the single action: go to Twitter and play.
keyCharacteristics: Cinematic darkness as negative space; dark makes neon brighter
Scroll-driven storytelling with GSAP + Lenis smooth scroll
Glow-based depth (no drop shadows, never material-style elevation)
Three-font hierarchy: Space Grotesk, Inter, JetBrains Mono
Section composition like scenes in a game trailer
Text readability always takes priority over visual effects

rules.name: The Glow Budget Rule
rules.body: Each section gets one primary glow source (the accent heading), one secondary glow source (a card or badge border on hover), and nothing more. Stacking three or more glows in the same viewport makes the page feel like a Christmas tree.

rules.name: The 3% Opacity Floor
rules.body: Decorative background elements (hexagons, floating dots, radial gradients) never exceed 3% opacity. They're felt, not seen.

rules.name: The Single Glow Word Rule
rules.body: Each headline contains exactly one accent-colored word with a text-shadow glow. The rest of the heading is solid white. Never glow the entire heading.

rules.name: The Opacity Ladder Rule
rules.body: Text opacity follows a strict ladder: 100% (headings), 80% (tagline), 55% (scroll layer descriptions), 45% (card descriptions), 40% (section subtitles), 35% (labels/mono). Never use an arbitrary opacity.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow casts a downward shadow with positive Y-offset as a depth cue. Every shadow is a centered glow (0 0 Npx). The only exception: inset 0 -3px 0 on btn-neon for the pressed-button bevel.

dos: Do use cinematic darkness as negative space. Void Black sections with generous padding create breathing room.
Do limit each section to one primary glow source.
Do follow the Opacity Ladder for text: 100% → 80% → 55% → 45% → 40% → 35%.
Do use power3.out for entrances and power3.in for exits.
Do use elastic.out(1, 0.5-0.6) for hover-leave animations.
Do keep decorative background elements at 3% opacity or below.
Do use Space Grotesk for headings, Inter for body, JetBrains Mono for labels.
Do let text readability always take priority over visual effects.
Do use backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%) for glass panels.
Do compose each section like a scene in a game trailer.
donts: Don't use drop shadows with positive Y-offset for depth.
Don't build hero-metric templates (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't use corporate blue gradients or social proof strips.
Don't use cookie-cutter neon on black with hexagons as decoration.
Don't put yield tables or tokenomics charts on the landing page.
Don't stack more than two glows in the same viewport.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing for scroll-driven animations.
Don't exceed 65ch line length for body text.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively or as a default surface.
